about_discord: Talk to the maintainer on Discord
about_donate_blurb: BATorrent is free and ad-free. If it's useful, consider sponsoring development — every contribution goes toward a Windows code-signing certificate and ongoing maintenance.
about_no_telemetry: No telemetry, no analytics, no calls home. The only outbound request the app initiates without you is the GitHub release check — and that can be disabled in Settings.
about_no_telemetry_body: No telemetry, no analytics, no phoning home. The only outbound request is the GitHub release check — and it's optional.
add_torrent_magnet_hint: Metadata will be downloaded after adding.
addon_auto_trackers: Automatically add public trackers to new torrents
addon_empty_hint: No addons installed yet. Pick one from Suggested below, or paste an addon URL.
addon_intro: Extend BATorrent with community add-ons for catalogs, streams and search.
addon_search_enable_hint: Lets the search window use the configured API
addon_subtitle: Extend BATorrent with community-built addons for catalogs, streams, and search.
addon_torrent_search_hint: Enter the URL of a torrent search API that returns JSON arrays with name, info_hash, size, seeders, leechers fields.
addon_torrent_search_url_hint: URL of a compatible torrent search API
adv_ignore_lan: Exempt LAN peers from speed limits
adv_rate_overhead: Include IP overhead in rate limits
create_err_empty: Please fill in source and output paths.
create_err_no_files: No files found in the selected source.
create_private_hint: Disables DHT, PEX and LSD — for private trackers
create_source_placeholder: Path to file or folder to share
create_start_seed_hint: Adds the torrent and starts seeding
defender_exclude_fail: Failed to add exclusion. Make sure to accept the UAC prompt.
defender_exclude_ok: Folder added to Windows Defender exclusions: %1
diag_at_local_limit: Hitting your per-torrent download cap of %1 KB/s. Raise it in the context menu → Download limit.
diag_check_dht_off: DHT disabled — public torrents will rely on trackers only.
diag_check_encryption_off: Protocol encryption disabled — some ISPs throttle plaintext BitTorrent.
diag_check_leecher_off: Leecher blocking disabled — Xunlei/QQDownload peers are allowed.
diag_check_leecher_on: Leecher blocking enabled — %1 blocked this session
diag_check_listen_port_warn: Listen port out of range — peers may not be able to reach you.
diag_check_vpn_missing: VPN interface '%1' is configured but NOT currently up — traffic may leak.
diag_check_vpn_none: No VPN binding configured — peer traffic uses your default interface.
diag_choked: Peers are connected but choking us. Often resolves itself within minutes as the swarm rotates unchoke slots.
diag_completed: Marked as Completed — no traffic by design. Resume to seed again.
diag_ip_idle: Press 'Test outgoing IP' to see what address your peers are talking to.
diag_ip_no_vpn: No outgoing interface is bound — this is your real public IP. Set Settings → VPN → Interface to mask it.
diag_no_peers: No peers connected. Try Force re-announce; check trackers list; verify your listen port isn't firewalled.
diag_no_seeds: Connected to peers but no seeders — only leechers can swap partial data. Wait for a seeder to come online.
diag_paused: This torrent is paused. Click Resume to start it.
diag_press_run: Press 'Run health check' to validate your current configuration.
diag_seeding_no_uploaders: Seeding, but no peers are downloading from you right now. Try Force re-announce.
dlg_confirm_delete_msg: Delete selected torrent(s) and their downloaded files?
dlg_pause_all_msg: %1 torrents are currently active. Pause them all?
dlg_save_path_missing:
Default save folder is not available:
%1

Falling back to:
%2
dlg_set_default_msg: Would you like to set BATorrent as the default application for .torrent files and magnet links?
empty_active_b: All your torrents are paused, completed, or queued. Try the All filter.
empty_body: Drop a .torrent file anywhere on this window, paste a magnet link, or use the toolbar.
empty_body2: Add a .torrent file, paste a magnet link or search — your downloads show up here.
empty_completed_b: Stop a finished torrent (square button) to freeze it here, or set an auto-complete window in Settings.
empty_downloading_b: Add a torrent or magnet link to start one.
empty_drag_hint: or drag files onto this window
empty_finished_b: This transitional state is brief — most finished torrents move straight to Seeding.
empty_paused_b: Hit Space on a row to pause it, or use Pause All from the Torrent menu.
empty_queued_b: When the active downloads cap is reached, new adds wait here in line.
empty_seeding_b: A finished torrent will appear here while it's sharing back to the swarm.
error_disk_full: Disk full — all downloads paused. Free up space and resume manually.
full_restore_bad_format: That doesn't look like a BATorrent backup.
import_qbt_none: No new torrents found in qBittorrent data.
import_restart: Please restart BATorrent for changes to take effect.
killswitch_triggered: VPN interface went down — all torrents paused.
logviewer_clear_confirm: Delete the current log file? Rotated archives are kept.
logviewer_save_failed: Could not write the log export.
magnet_meta_hint: Metadata (name and file list) will be downloaded from the network after adding.
magnet_multi_hint: Accepts multiple links, one per line
pairing_desc: Make sure your phone is on the same Wi-Fi as this computer, then open the URL below in any mobile browser. Login uses the same username and password set in the WebUI tab.
pairing_heading: Open the WebUI on your phone
pairing_hint: Pro tip: bookmark the URL so future opens are one tap. Long URL? Use Copy and AirDrop / share-to-self.
pairing_no_iface: No active network interface found. Connect to Wi-Fi or wired network.
pairing_no_lan: Couldn't find an active LAN interface. Connect to Wi-Fi or Ethernet and try again.
pairing_scan_hint: Open your phone's camera and point it at the QR, or type the URL in the browser. The device must be on the same network.
release_notes_subtitle: Here's what's new in this version:
remove_also_files: Also delete the files from disk
remove_confirm_body: You are about to remove %1 from the list. This action cannot be undone.
removed_history_clear_confirm: Clear the history of removed torrents? This deletes the stored resume snapshots — torrent files on disk are unaffected.
removed_history_desc: Last 50 torrents you removed. Re-add to restart with the same save path; the actual files on disk are untouched (you used Remove, not Remove with files).
removed_history_desc2: Restore a torrent removed by mistake. The history keeps the last 50.
removed_history_failed: Couldn't restore the torrent — the resume snapshot may be missing or unreadable.
rss_no_rule: No auto-download rule on this feed
rss_subtitle: Add feed URLs and BATorrent will watch them for new torrents matching your filters.
search_no_addons: No addons installed. Go to Settings > Addons to add one.
search_no_catalog: No catalog addon enabled. Enable Cinemeta in Settings > Addons.
search_no_stream: No stream addon enabled. Enable Torrentio in Settings > Addons.
set_anon_note: Hides client name/version in handshakes and disables UPnP/NAT-PMP announcements.
set_api_url_ph: URL of a compatible search API
set_auto_complete_note: After this continuous seeding time, marks the torrent as Completed (green, paused).
set_auto_shutdown_note: Shut down the computer after all downloads finish (60s cancelable countdown).
set_auto_trackers2: Add public trackers automatically to new torrents
set_auto_trackers_note: Automatically add a maintained public tracker list to new torrents.
set_autoresume_note: Resumes only the torrents the kill switch paused — not the ones you paused manually.
set_blocklist_note: Loaded IP ranges are dropped before the handshake.
set_dht_note: Discovers peers without a tracker. Disable on private trackers (BEP-27).
set_discord_note: Discord Rich Presence — shows your download/seed status. Requires the Discord app running.
set_encryption_note: Forced = encrypted only. Many ISPs throttle plaintext BitTorrent.
set_killswitch_note: Pauses every active torrent the instant the bound interface goes down.
set_listen_port_note: Peer connections come in here. Match it with your router's port-forward rule.
set_media_jellyfin: Notify Jellyfin / Emby on download complete
set_pair_note: Shows a copyable LAN URL for opening the WebUI on your phone.
set_proxy_type_note: Routes all peer + tracker traffic through a SOCKS5 or HTTP proxy.
set_pt_note: Turns off DHT/PEX/LSD, forces anonymous handshake and announces to all tiers.
set_scheduler_note: Switches to the alternate limits during a configured time window and days.
set_seed_ratio_note: Pauses seeding when upload ÷ download reaches this ratio. 0 = no limit.
set_sub_addons: Automatic trackers, torrent search, media servers and extraction.
set_sub_advanced: Fine-tune disk I/O, connections, choke algorithms and metadata APIs.
set_sub_general: Download folders, language, appearance and system-tray behavior.
set_sub_network: Listen port, peer discovery, encryption and protocol privacy.
set_sub_notif: Get alerts via Telegram, show activity on Discord and enable sounds.
set_sub_proxy: Route peers and trackers through a proxy and drop IP ranges via blocklist.
set_sub_speed: Global and alternate limits, seeding rules and time scheduling.
set_sub_vpn: Bind traffic to an interface and protect against leaks outside the VPN.
set_sub_webui: Control BATorrent from the browser and pair your phone on the same network.
set_telegram_token_note: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram and paste the HTTP API token here.
set_temp_path_note: Incomplete downloads go here first, then move to the destination when they finish.
set_temp_path_ph: Download to this folder first, move when done
set_tmdb_note: Free key from themoviedb.org — movie/series posters.
set_use_tor_note: Route all traffic through Tor (SOCKS5 127.0.0.1:9050). Tor must be running.
set_verbose_note: Captures extra detail on libtorrent events. Use when reporting a bug; turn off afterwards.
settings_auto_shutdown: Shut down PC when all downloads finish
settings_close_to_tray: Close to tray instead of quitting
settings_default_failed: Could not set default. Try running as administrator.
settings_default_success: BATorrent is now the default torrent application.
settings_defender_exclude: Add download folder to Windows Defender exclusions
settings_discord_help: When enabled, your Discord friends see what you're downloading / seeding in your profile activity card. Two buttons link them straight to the BATorrent releases page.
settings_extract_passwords_hint: Passwords to try, separated by ; (e.g. online-fix.me; password123)
settings_iface_any_desc: Traffic will use any available interface
settings_kill_switch: Pause torrents if interface drops (Kill Switch)
settings_random_port: Use a random port on each launch
settings_run_on_hint: e.g. notify-send "%N completed" or curl http://...
settings_search_placeholder: Search settings — DHT, port, ratio, kill switch...
settings_seed_ratio: Stop seeding at ratio (0 = no limit):
settings_set_default: Set BATorrent as default torrent app
settings_telegram_test_missing: Fill in token + chat ID first.
settings_temp_path_hint: Download to this folder first, move to save path on completion
settings_use_default_path: Always use default save path (skip folder dialog)
settings_webui_warning_msg: Enabling remote access exposes the WebUI to your network. Use a VPN or reverse proxy with HTTPS for secure remote access.
shutdown_msg: All downloads complete. Shutting down in %1 seconds...
smartpaste_body:
Detected a magnet link or info hash:

%1

Add it as a torrent?
speedtest_subtitle: Measures ping, download, and upload against Cloudflare's edge.
stream_no_player: No video player found. Install VLC or IINA to stream.
stream_no_video: No video file found in this torrent.
tip_adv_aio: Async I/O threads for disk operations
tip_adv_choking: How upload slots are distributed among peers
tip_adv_ignorelan: Peers on 10.x / 172.16.x / 192.168.x bypass your download/upload limits
tip_adv_seedchoking: How seeding slots are distributed. Anti-leech prioritizes peers that upload back.
tip_anonymous_mode: Hide the client name/version in handshakes and disable UPnP/NAT-PMP advertisements. Less fingerprintable; expected by some privacy-focused trackers.
tip_auto_complete: After this much continuous seeding time, mark the torrent as Completed (green state, paused, persisted). 'Never' disables auto-promotion.
tip_auto_extract: Automatically extract RAR, ZIP, and 7z archives when a torrent finishes downloading. Requires 7-Zip/WinRAR (Windows) or unrar/unzip (macOS/Linux) installed.
tip_auto_extract_delete: Remove the original archive files (.rar, .zip, .7z) after successful extraction to free disk space.
tip_auto_resume: When the killed interface comes back, resume only the torrents the kill switch paused — not the ones you paused manually.
tip_block_leechers: Auto-detect and ban peers using Xunlei (Thunder), QQDownload, Baidu Netdisk P2P, and other clients known to download without seeding back. Detected by peer_id in the BitTorrent handshake. Essential for fair swarm health on Chinese trackers.
tip_content_layout: Original: use torrent's file structure. Create subfolder: wrap single files in a folder. No subfolder: flatten multi-file torrents.
tip_defender_exclude: Adds your download folder to Windows Defender exclusion list so it stops flagging downloaded files. Requires administrator permission (UAC prompt).
tip_dht: Distributed Hash Table — discovers peers without trackers. Disable on private trackers (BEP-27).
tip_discord_client_id: Application ID from your own Discord developer portal. Leave empty to use BATorrent's default badge.
tip_discord_enabled: Discord Rich Presence — shows your current download/seeding status on your Discord profile. Requires the Discord desktop app to be running. Disable if you prefer privacy.
tip_encryption: Encrypt peer connections.  Enabled = accept any, Forced = encrypted only, Disabled = plaintext only. Many ISPs throttle plaintext BitTorrent.
tip_excluded_patterns: Files matching these regex patterns will be auto-skipped (priority 0) when adding a torrent. Separate patterns with semicolons.
tip_extract_passwords: List of passwords to try when extracting password-protected archives. The extractor tries without password first, then each password in order.
tip_force_ipv4: Bind only to 0.0.0.0 and reject IPv6 peers. Sidesteps trackers that misbehave with v6 (still common on RU/CN private trackers) and prevents v6 leaks when the v6 path isn't tunnelled.
tip_force_start: Keep this torrent running even when the active-downloads cap is reached. Useful for the one torrent you actually need now.
tip_ip_filter: Path to a P2P-format blocklist (.dat / .p2p). Loaded IP ranges are dropped before any handshake.
tip_kill_switch: Pause every active torrent the moment the bound interface drops, so traffic never leaks outside the VPN.
tip_listen_port: Incoming peer connections arrive here. Match your UPnP / router port-forward rule for maximum reachability.
tip_pairing: Shows a copyable LAN URL so you can open the WebUI on your phone without finding your machine's IP.
tip_proxy: Route all peer + tracker traffic through a SOCKS5 or HTTP proxy. Complements VPN binding; can be combined.
tip_pt_mode: One-toggle compliance for private trackers: turns off DHT/PEX/LSD, forces anonymous handshake, and announces to every tier. Required by RuTracker private, M-Team, TorrentLeech and most ratio-tracked communities.
tip_run_on_complete: Run this command when a torrent finishes. Variables: %N=name, %D=save path, %H=hash, %Z=size, %F=file path
tip_scheduler: Switch to the alternative speed limits during a configured time window and weekday set.
tip_seed_ratio: Auto-pause seeding once total upload ÷ download reaches this ratio. 0 = unlimited.
tip_speed_unit: Bytes is the file-manager convention (1 KB/s = 1024 bytes/sec). Bits is the ISP / telecom convention (1 Mbps = 1 million bits/sec — what your speed test reports). Affects every speed reading in the app.
tip_stop_after_download: Pause the torrent the moment 100% is reached, skipping the seeding phase entirely.
tip_telegram_chat: Your numeric user ID (DM @userinfobot to get it) or @yourchannel for a channel where the bot is admin.
tip_telegram_token: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram, then paste the HTTP API token here (format: 123456:ABC-DEF...).
tip_temp_path: Incomplete downloads go here first, then move to the save path when finished. Useful to keep media servers from scanning partial files.
tip_update_channel: Where the app fetches release information. Use Gitee when GitHub is slow or blocked. Disabled silences all background update checks.
tip_use_tor: Fill the proxy fields with the default Tor SOCKS5 endpoint. Requires Tor to be running locally.
tip_utp: uTP is libtorrent's UDP transport. Disable to force TCP only — useful on misconfigured routers where uTP retransmits saturate the link.
tip_verbose_log: Capture extra detail about libtorrent events, network calls, and internal state. Use when reporting a bug; revert when fixed to keep the log file small.
tip_watched_folder: BATorrent scans this folder every 10s and auto-adds any .torrent files found. Files are moved to .processed/ after adding.
update_available: BATorrent %1 is available. Download and install now?
update_none: You are running the latest version.
update_uptodate: You're already on the latest version.
warn_low_disk: Low disk space — only %1 MB remaining. Downloads may fail if disk fills up.
welcome_blurb2: BATorrent is a lightweight, open-source BitTorrent client. Functional, dark, focused.
welcome_step1_desc: Click 'Open' in the toolbar to add a .torrent file, or use 'Magnet' for magnet links. You can also drag & drop files directly into the window.
welcome_step2_desc: Use Pause, Resume, and Remove buttons to control your downloads. Select a torrent to see details, peers, and files in the panel below.
welcome_step3_desc: Go to Settings > Preferences to set speed limits and default save path. Closing the window minimizes to system tray — right-click the tray icon to quit.
welcome_subtitle_text: BATorrent is a lightweight, open-source BitTorrent client. Functional, dark, focused — nothing between you and the swarm.
